title: User manifest feed stores drive index, stamps, and standalone documents
content:
# User Manifest Feed Structure

The user manifest feed lives at topic `ph:v2:user:<address>` and is owned by the user's signer address. Each feed index points to a `/bytes` upload containing encrypted JSON.

## Schema

```json
{
  "address": "0xAlice",
  "drives": {
    "drive-abc": {
      "name": "Finance Drive",
      "documentIds": [],
      "lastUpdated": "2026-04-10T12:00:00Z"
    }
  },
  "stamps": {},
  "documents": {},
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-10T12:00:00Z"
}
```

## Role

- Serves as the top-level index into a user's data on Swarm
- Points to drives (each with its own manifest feed)
- Tracks postage stamps and standalone documents
- Recovery starts here: read the user manifest, then descend into drive manifests, then document manifests
description: User manifest feed at ph:v2:user:<address> stores drives map, stamps, documents, and updatedAt as encrypted JSON on /bytes, referenced by feed index.
